top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TSMC’s relentless rise powers Taiwan’s market value above India
top_signals.summary: The island's market capitalization climbed to $4.95 trillion as of Monday, while India's value has dropped to $4.92 trillion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Is housebuilding in London impossible?
top_signals.summary: After its 900-home development in Peckham was blocked, housebuilder Berkeley said it can “no longer invest” in London. Felix Armstrong asks whether development in the capital really has hit a brick wall At the Aylesham Centre in Peckham, south London, shoppers are met with graffitied walls, peeling paint and shuttered retail units. The site began [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘We don’t know who deployed this’: Squid distances itself from $3.2 million third-party module exploit
top_signals.summary: Squid said its core protocol was unaffected after a third-party module named SquidRouterModule was exploited for roughly $3.2 million.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
